name: Recruitee
shortDescription: Automate Recruitee, an applicant tracking system: candidates, jobs, pipelines, interviews, notes, tasks, requisitions, and communication. Uses a Personal API Token and Company ID.

actions.name: Test Connection
actions.description: Checks that your API Token and Company ID are valid by looking up the signed-in user. Use this first to confirm the connection works before building a flow.

actions.name: Find Candidates
actions.description: Finds candidates in your account. Leave the search box empty to list the most recent candidates, or type a name, email, or keyword to search. You can also narrow results to a single job or by status.

actions.name: Get Candidate
actions.description: Returns the full profile of one candidate, including contact details, jobs they are on, tags, and current stage.

actions.name: Add Candidate
actions.description: Adds a new candidate to your account, optionally placing them on a job. Turn on "Update if already exists" to update the matching candidate instead of creating a duplicate when the email is already on file.

actions.name: Update Candidate
actions.description: Updates a candidate's basic details. Only the fields you fill in are changed; leave a field empty to keep its current value.

actions.name: Delete Candidate
actions.description: Permanently deletes a candidate and all their data. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off first to preview who would be removed.

actions.name: Add Candidate to Job
actions.description: Places an existing candidate onto a job's hiring pipeline, optionally in a specific stage.

actions.name: Move Candidate to Stage
actions.description: Moves one or more candidates to a different stage in a job's hiring pipeline (for example from 'Screening' to 'Interview').

actions.name: Disqualify Candidate
actions.description: Disqualifies one or more candidates on a job, optionally recording a reason (e.g. 'Withdrew', 'Not a fit').

actions.name: Restore (Requalify) Candidate
actions.description: Reverses a disqualification, putting one or more candidates back into a job's active pipeline.

actions.name: Add Tags to Candidate
actions.description: Adds one or more tags (labels) to a candidate. Tags that don't exist yet are created automatically.

actions.name: Add Source to Candidate
actions.description: Records where a candidate came from (for example 'LinkedIn' or 'Referral'). Useful for tracking your best hiring channels.

actions.name: Add Candidate to Talent Pool
actions.description: Adds a candidate to a talent pool so you can keep them on file for future roles.

actions.name: Parse Candidate CV
actions.description: Re-reads the candidate's current CV and fills in details like work history, education, and skills from it.

actions.name: Merge Candidates
actions.description: Merges a duplicate candidate profile into a main one, combining their history into a single profile.

actions.name: Find Jobs
actions.description: Lists the jobs in your account. By default this shows current (non-archived) jobs; turn on "Include archived" or pick a status to change that.

actions.name: Get Job
actions.description: Returns the full details of one job, including its description, location, department, and pipeline.

actions.name: Create Job
actions.description: Creates a new job. It starts as a draft so you can review it before publishing with "Update Job Status".

actions.name: Update Job
actions.description: Updates a job's details. Only the fields you fill in are changed.

actions.name: Update Job Status
actions.description: Changes whether a job is published, internal-only, closed, archived, or a draft — all in one place.

actions.name: Duplicate Job
actions.description: Creates a copy of an existing job as a new draft, so you can quickly post a similar role.

actions.name: Delete Job
actions.description: Permanently deletes a job (or talent pool) and its candidate links. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first. To simply close a job, use "Update Job Status" instead.

actions.name: Tag Job
actions.description: Adds or removes labels on a job, making it easier to group and find jobs.

actions.name: Get Job Candidates
actions.description: Lists the candidates currently on a job's pipeline, along with the stage each one is in.

actions.name: List Job Stages
actions.description: Lists the hiring pipeline stages for a job (for example Applied, Screening, Interview, Hired).

actions.name: List Pipeline Templates
actions.description: Lists the reusable hiring pipeline templates in your account.

actions.name: Get Pipeline Template
actions.description: Returns one pipeline template with its stages.

actions.name: Create Pipeline Template
actions.description: Creates a new reusable hiring pipeline template.

actions.name: Update Pipeline Template
actions.description: Renames an existing pipeline template.

actions.name: Delete Pipeline Template
actions.description: Permanently deletes a pipeline template. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: Add Pipeline Stage
actions.description: Adds a new stage to a pipeline template.

actions.name: Update Pipeline Stage
actions.description: Renames a stage within a pipeline template.

actions.name: Delete Pipeline Stage
actions.description: Deletes a stage from a pipeline template, moving any candidates in it to another stage you choose. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Disqualify Reasons
actions.description: Lists the reasons your team can use when disqualifying candidates.

actions.name: Create Disqualify Reason
actions.description: Adds a new disqualify reason your team can choose from.

actions.name: Update Disqualify Reason
actions.description: Renames an existing disqualify reason.

actions.name: Delete Disqualify Reason
actions.description: Permanently deletes a disqualify reason. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Departments
actions.description: Lists the departments in your account.

actions.name: Create Department
actions.description: Adds a new department.

actions.name: Delete Department
actions.description: Permanently deletes a department. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Locations
actions.description: Lists the office locations in your account.

actions.name: Create Location
actions.description: Adds a new office location.

actions.name: Delete Location
actions.description: Permanently deletes an office location. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Lists all candidate tags used in your account.

actions.name: List Sources
actions.description: Lists all candidate sources used in your account.

actions.name: List Talent Pools
actions.description: Lists the talent pools in your account.

actions.name: Create Talent Pool
actions.description: Creates a new talent pool to keep promising candidates on file for future roles.

actions.name: List Team Members
actions.description: Lists the hiring team members (admins) in your account.

actions.name: Add Candidate Note
actions.description: Adds a note to a candidate's profile. Notes are great for interview feedback, reminders, or context for your team.

actions.name: List Candidate Notes
actions.description: Lists the notes saved on a candidate's profile.

actions.name: Add Note
actions.description: Adds a note to a candidate, job, talent pool, or requisition. For candidates, "Add Candidate Note" offers a handy candidate picker.

actions.name: Update Note
actions.description: Edits the text of an existing note.

actions.name: Pin or Unpin Note
actions.description: Pins a note to the top of a profile, or unpins it.

actions.name: Delete Note
actions.description: Permanently deletes a note. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a to-do task, optionally linked to a candidate and assigned to a team member with a due date.

actions.name: List Tasks
actions.description: Lists tasks in your account, optionally only completed or only open ones.

actions.name: Get Task
actions.description: Returns the details of one task.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates a task's title, due date, or whether it's completed.

actions.name: Complete Task
actions.description: Marks a task as done.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Permanently deletes a task. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Activity
actions.description: Shows the recent activity timeline — who did what and when. Narrow it to a single candidate or job, or leave both empty for company-wide activity.

actions.name: List Custom Field Sets
actions.description: Lists the custom field sets (groups of extra fields) configured in your account.

actions.name: Create Custom Field Set
actions.description: Creates a new custom field set.

actions.name: Delete Custom Field Set
actions.description: Permanently deletes a custom field set. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: Set Candidate Custom Field
actions.description: Sets the value of one custom field on a candidate's profile.

actions.name: Schedule Interview
actions.description: Schedules an interview for a candidate at a chosen time. Turn on "Notify participants" to email the candidate and interviewers an invitation.

actions.name: List Interviews
actions.description: Lists scheduled interview events, optionally for one candidate or within a date range.

actions.name: Get Interview
actions.description: Returns the details of one interview event.

actions.name: Update Interview
actions.description: Updates an interview's title, time, or location.

actions.name: Cancel Interview
actions.description: Cancels (deletes) an interview event and notifies the candidate. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: Submit Scorecard
actions.description: Records interview feedback (a scorecard) for a candidate, including an overall rating and comments.

actions.name: List Scorecards
actions.description: Lists the interview feedback (scorecards) recorded for a candidate.

actions.name: Request Interview Feedback
actions.description: Asks one or more team members to leave interview feedback for a candidate.

actions.name: List Interview Templates
actions.description: Lists the reusable interview templates (question sets / scorecards) in your account.

actions.name: Create Interview Template
actions.description: Creates a new interview template.

actions.name: Delete Interview Template
actions.description: Permanently deletes an interview template. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Interview Availability Schedules
actions.description: Lists your self-scheduling templates that let candidates pick an interview slot themselves.

actions.name: List Meeting Rooms
actions.description: Lists the meeting rooms available for booking interviews.

actions.name: List Calendars
actions.description: Lists the connected calendars used for scheduling interviews.

actions.name: Send Email to Candidate
actions.description: Sends an email to a candidate. You can write the message yourself or start from a saved template.

actions.name: Schedule Email to Candidate
actions.description: Schedules an email to be sent to a candidate at a future time.

actions.name: List Candidate Emails
actions.description: Lists the email conversations with a candidate.

actions.name: Get Email Thread
actions.description: Returns one email conversation with its messages.

actions.name: List Email Templates
actions.description: Lists your saved email templates of a chosen type.

actions.name: Create Email Template
actions.description: Creates a new saved email template.

actions.name: Delete Email Template
actions.description: Permanently deletes a saved email template. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: Send Text Message (SMS)
actions.description: Sends an SMS text message to a candidate (requires texting to be enabled in your Recruitee account).

actions.name: List Text Messages (SMS)
actions.description: Lists SMS conversations, optionally for a single candidate.

actions.name: Find Requisitions
actions.description: Lists hiring requisitions (requests to open a role), optionally filtered by status.

actions.name: Get Requisition
actions.description: Returns the details of one requisition.

actions.name: Create Requisition
actions.description: Creates a new hiring requisition to request approval to open a role.

actions.name: Update Requisition
actions.description: Updates a requisition's title, department, or number of openings.

actions.name: Update Requisition Status
actions.description: Approves, rejects, archives, cancels, or restores a requisition — all in one place.

actions.name: Delete Requisition
actions.description: Permanently deletes a pending requisition. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Saved Searches
actions.description: Lists your saved candidate searches (segments).

actions.name: Create Saved Search
actions.description: Saves a candidate search so you can reuse it later.

actions.name: Delete Saved Search
actions.description: Permanently deletes a saved search. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

actions.name: List Imports
actions.description: Lists candidate import jobs (CSV uploads) and their status.

actions.name: Get Import
actions.description: Returns the details and status of one candidate import.

actions.name: Revert Import
actions.description: Reverts a candidate import, removing the candidates it added. This cannot be undone. Leave "Confirm" off to preview first.

idealUseCases: Add and route candidates into the right job and pipeline stage
Move, disqualify, tag, and source candidates in a hiring flow
Create and publish jobs; schedule interviews and submit scorecards
Email or SMS candidates and log notes, tasks, and activity
agentIdeas: On **Recruitee** "On New Candidate", use **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the hiring manager the applicant's CV link.
On **Recruitee** "On Candidate Moved to Stage" for "Interview", use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to alert the team.
On **Recruitee** "On Status Change" for hires, use **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log the new hire to a tracker.
